_README: Affiliate program registry — the monetization last-mile.
monitor_agent detects which tools leak revenue (clicks, no tracked link).
This file tells the system HOW to close each leak, so the only human step
left is the irreducible one: sign up for the program.
signup_url values below are REAL affiliate application entries, web-verified
2026-06-05 (most run on third-party networks — Impact/PartnerStack/Awin/
FirstPromoter/Rewardful/Tapfiliate — NOT the tool's own site). 'commission'
is the headline payout at research time; confirm on the live page.
Per-tool status:
ready       -> signup_url is a live application entry; apply, then paste
affiliate_id (templated network) OR affiliate_url (full link).
needs_check -> program exists but no open self-serve signup (login/invite
gated) or unverified; see notes.
no_program  -> no joinable affiliate program (none, or closed). monitor
stops flagging it.
self        -> monetize via your OWN offer; route CTA through /api/out.
How one signup monetizes a tool (and stays automatic):
1. Apply via signup_url.
2a. Templated network (FirstPromoter/Rewardful/Tolt/generic) -> put your
affiliate_id; the system builds the tracked link.
2b. Opaque network (Impact/PartnerStack/Awin/Tapfiliate/CJ/ShareASale) ->
paste your full tracked link into affiliate_url.
3. affiliate_autofill.py writes tools.affiliate_url; monitor auto-resolves.
NEVER invent an affiliate_id/affiliate_url. Only real values from signing up.

impact.note: Impact.com links are per-creative and opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

partnerstack.note: PartnerStack links are opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

awin.note: Awin links are opaque (awin1.com deep links). Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

tapfiliate.note: Tapfiliate links are opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

cj.note: CJ Affiliate links are opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

shareasale.note: ShareASale links are opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

own.note: In-house program. Paste the full tracked link you get after signing up into affiliate_url.

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.commission: 22% recurring for 12 months (11% on Business), 90-day cookie
elevenlabs.notes: Verified open. Onboards into PartnerStack -> paste full tracked link.

descript.name: Descript
descript.commission: 15% recurring for 12 months, monthly PayPal payout

writesonic.name: Writesonic
writesonic.notes: Verified open. FirstPromoter -> can use templated link ?fpr={affiliate_id}, or paste full link.

manychat.name: ManyChat
manychat.notes: Verified open. Vanity: https://manychat.partnerstack.com/ . Referral must upgrade to Pro within 90 days.

surfer-seo.name: Surfer SEO
surfer-seo.commission: Tiered first-month CPA 75%-125% (or 15%-25% first-year), 90-day cookie, NET-45

canva.name: Canva
canva.notes: Verified open (Impact). Individual creators may be routed via Canvassador (periodically closed).

photoroom.name: Photoroom
photoroom.notes: Verified open (Awin merchant 121800, approval required). Alt: Dub Partners https://partners.dub.co/photoroom/register

pixlr-ai.name: Pixlr AI
pixlr-ai.commission: Up to 25% on new Premium/Plus subscriptions
pixlr-ai.notes: Verified open (Awin merchant 65758, approval required). Official: https://pixlr.com/affiliate/

copy-ai.name: Copy.ai
copy-ai.notes: PartnerStack (medium confidence on exact subdomain — confirm branding on the page). copy.ai/affiliates itself 404s.

steve-ai.name: Steve.ai
steve-ai.notes: Verified open. In-house program — application form embedded on the page.

gamma.name: Gamma
gamma.notes: Verified open (PartnerStack affiliate group). Separate reseller 'Partner Program' exists too.

heygen.name: HeyGen
heygen.notes: Program confirmed via official help center; signup URL from search (Rewardful pages 403 to bots, so confirm on click). Contact: affiliates@heygen.com

nightcafe.name: NightCafe
nightcafe.commission: Up to 10% commission + 5% follower discount; requires 10k+ followers
nightcafe.notes: Verified. No self-serve form — apply by email via their feedback/contact channel. Separate referral program at creator.nightcafe.studio/referrals.

ideogram.name: Ideogram
ideogram.commission: Creators Club rewards; rate not publicly disclosed
ideogram.notes: Curated 'Creators Club' (invite/selective), Google-Form application. Info: ideogram.ai/features/creators-club

runway.name: Runway
runway.notes: Affiliate portal affiliates.runwayml.com is login-only — no public self-serve signup (invite/application gated). The 'Creative Partners Program' is a separate non-commission perks program.

framer.name: Framer
framer.notes: Not yet verified this round. Likely PartnerStack — confirm.

replicate.name: Replicate
replicate.notes: Not yet verified this round (developer/model hosting — may have no consumer affiliate).

leonardoai.name: Leonardo.AI
leonardoai.notes: Affiliate program CLOSED 2026-04-07 (was Impact, 60% first month / 30-day cookie). Not joinable now — suppress; revisit if it reopens.

notion-ai.name: Notion
notion-ai.notes: PartnerStack program is currently CLOSED to new affiliates (applications auto-declined). Suppress; revisit if it reopens (~$50/activation + 20% year-one).

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.notes: No paid affiliate program — only a community Ambassador program (no commission). Cursor does not authorize resellers. Suppress.

dall-e-3.name: DALL-E 3
dall-e-3.notes: OpenAI has no affiliate program. Suppress; revenue here must come from comparison/alternative pages routing to monetizable tools.

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT
chatgpt.notes: OpenAI — no affiliate program. Suppress. See strategic opportunity zh-chatgpt-access for the real money here.

perplexity-ai.name: Perplexity AI
perplexity-ai.notes: No public affiliate program as of 2026-06. Suppress; revisit if one launches.

craiyon.name: Craiyon
craiyon.notes: Free tool, ad-supported, no affiliate program. Suppress.

strategic_opportunities.title: 中文 ChatGPT 接入需求 — 站内最大单一搜索需求
strategic_opportunities.evidence: GSC: 'chatgpt 充值/产品/怎么用' 查询簇约 900 impressions/月，远超任何单个工具页需求。
strategic_opportunities.implemented: 2026-06-04: /access (ZH) hero + exit CTA 经 /api/out?target=chatgpt-access 指向佣金联盟 https://nf.video/65JGC，已计入 outbound 追踪 + tool_outbound_click 转化事件。
strategic_opportunities.next: 扩展到 ZH answer 页（/answers/* 命中 chatgpt 接入意图的）；起量后看 outbound_click(target=chatgpt-access) 转化数据校准。
